title: Fluffy Brazilian Cassava Fritters
description: Light, airy cassava fritters that rise with yeast and steam in the pan, perfect for a lazy Sunday breakfast.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together cassava flour, baking powder, yeast, salt, and ground cumin.
Make a well in the center of the dry mixture and pour in the warm water.
Add the egg and stir until a thick batter forms.
Let the batter rest for 10 minutes so the yeast can activate.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add about 2 tbsp of oil.
Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil, flattening them slightly with the back of a spoon.
Fry each fritter for 3 to 4 minutes per side until golden brown and puffed.
Remove the fritters to paper towels to drain and serve warm.
